shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!dist'"' -g '"'!build'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- package files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'package.json' -g 'next.config.*' -g 'app/**' -g 'pages/**' -g 'src/**' | head -240"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' lib/db.js && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && sed -n '1,200p' package.json && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,160p' next.config.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- app/page.tsx app/layout.tsx lib/db.js app/globals.css tsconfig.json 2>/dev/null || true; printf '\\n--- status ---\\n'; git status --short 2>/dev/null || true; printf '\\n--- server log ---\\n'; sed -n '1,80p' /tmp/product-catalog-next.log"
/bin/bash -lc "sleep 1; curl -sS -o /tmp/product-catalog-page.html -w '%{http_code}\\n' http://localhost:3000/; rg -o 'Product catalog|Sync latest catalog|SKU-0001' /tmp/product-catalog-page.html"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
